data.title: Global Automotive Lighting Market Outlook 2035 | USA, Europe, Asia Lead | Koito, Valeo, Hella Drive Smart Lighting Evolution
data.description: In Newark, Del., as of April 14, 2026, data from a recent study conducted by Future Market Insights reveals significant developments in the global automotive lighting sector. This industry is currently experiencing a period of substantial expansion driven by factors such as a surge in vehicle manufacturing, swift electrification processes, and the growing trend towards incorporating advanced lighting technologies. The analysis points to remarkable growth prospects for this market segment as it evolves to align with the changing automotive landscape.

data.title: Citigroup, JPMorgan And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Tuesday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading mixed. Investors may focus on certain stocks today including Citigroup Inc. (NYSE: C), which is expected to report quarterly earnings of $2.64 per share on revenue of $23.53 billion. Citigroup shares were up 0.2% to $126.48 in after-hours trading. Sana Biotechnology Inc. (NASDAQ: SANA) saw a significant increase in shares after announcing a strategic collaboration with Mayo Clinic to progress the development of SC451. Additionally, the company sold 7.5 million shares at $3.33 each. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Volvo launches new electric trucks - with ranges up to 700 km
data.description: Volvo Trucks is continuously advancing in the realm of electric truck transport by introducing new electric trucks that boast enhanced performance, flexibility, and can travel up to 700 km on a single charge. These latest additions set a new standard for electric heavy-duty trucks, marking a significant milestone in the industry.
Spain’s prime minister Sánchez said China is among the few actors able to play a key diplomatic role in efforts to end the Iran war.

data.title: Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos launches an 8.5% yield bond offering
data.description: AEI, a division of Lords LB Asset Management, is set to introduce a new bond offering totaling EUR 2 million, featuring a steady annual interest of 8.5%. The firm, overseeing assets amounting to EUR 165 million, recently expanded its collection of active solar and wind farms to a total capacity of 303 MW in April. AEI is diligently working towards selling off all completed and functional projects by the conclusion of 2027 as part of its ongoing strategic plan.

data.title: Stegra has agreed in principle on a €1.4 billion financing round led by a Wallenberg Investments-consortium
data.description: In an announcement made in Stockholm on April 14, 2026, Stegra has reached a preliminary agreement for €1.4 billion in fresh funding from a mix of current and new investors. This funding is intended to finalize the establishment of their extensive green steel facility in Boden, Sweden. The main investor spearheading this financing round is Wallenberg.

data.title: OCI Global Sells Shares of Methanex Corporation
data.description: In Amsterdam on April 14, 2026, OCI Global (Euronext: OCI) disclosed that its wholly owned subsidiary, OCI Chemicals B.V., completed the sale of 2 million common shares (Shares) of Methanex Corporation. This sale equates to about 2.6% of Methanex's issued and outstanding shares.
The ASX 200 finishes the session 0.5% higher at 8,970.80 points.

data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Mandatory Notification of Trade by Primary Insider
data.description: Mikael Skov, the CEO of Hafnia Limited, recently made significant stock sales, with 500,000 shares sold on April 10, 2026, at an average price of NOK 77.0623 per share on Oslo Børs and another 500,000 shares sold on April 13, 2026, at an average price of NOK 77.015 per share on the same exchange. Despite these sales, Skov still holds a substantial financial stake in the company, with a total of 3,351,07 shares. Hafnia Limited can be identified on the Oslo Stock Exchange (OSE) with the ticker code "HAFNI," and on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) with the ticker code "HAFN."

data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING Wipro Limited to Announce Results for the Fourth Quarter Ended March 31, 2026, on April 16, 2026
data.description: Indian tech giant Wipro is set to release their fourth quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026, on Thursday, April 16, 2026. The announcement will be made after the close of stock market trading hours in India.
